name: honest-apply
description: Plug-and-play job application skill for full-time roles and freelance gigs. One interview personalizes it to you; then it runs a fit-filter -> tailor -> anti-slop -> log pipeline on every listing you paste, a batched daily flow that surfaces a filtered shortlist as an HTML review, and a freelance profile/platform recommender. Talks you OUT of bad-fit applications. Never auto-submits.
author: honest-apply contributors
